item.title: Re: Author Post!
item.content:encoded: New post due to the image licensing tag; the image is released into the public domain, per this page: https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Powerful_Owl_-_April_6_2009_Chatswood_West_edited..JPG

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the upvote! I'm glad you liked the feeling of dread element—it's one of the main reasons I wanted to co-author this piece.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You know, even though it refers to owls, the general cyclic revenge and vengeance-beyond-death theme made me think of The Crow.

+1 - I love the dread, as well as general anomalous vigilante stories. Justice and all that.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
it's ironic considering barred owls are the most adorable bird species IRL,

but but elf owls and other smol owls

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The shopped barred owl photo really makes the article for me. Also, it's ironic considering barred owls are the most adorable bird species IRL, so good job managing to make them seem creepy.

EDIT: I just found the original photo by googling "barred owl antenna" and discovered that it's neither photoshopped nor of a barred owl (I knew the shape and size of that head was a little off) but still, really clenches the piece for me.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Glad you liked it! We were definitely trying to go for old-school Series-I ish vibe.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was a fun read and has this old-timey feel to it.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm glad you remembered the article and came to read and enjoy the revamped version! Thanks for the +1. :)

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Glad to see an improved version of this article. Good to see an article with good ideas but without the best writing getting a makeover. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the nice comment and the upvote!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hey I remember this article from a while back. I really loved the concept, noticed a few flaws, and I had hoped that it would eventually be improved upon.

Glad to see its improved version finally come to fruition! Great job.

+1

item.title: Re: Author Post!
item.content:encoded:
It's been a great time! I really liked reading the article in the forums—I almost never critique a piece twice in the forums, and this was a rare exception for me as a reviewer.

Many, many thanks to everyone in chat who read this through and talked with us about how to tweak the writing and the content. I hope the current version is an enjoyable read!

And big thanks to IAmTheOoga for being patience with my hectic schedule, and hashing out the concept over several days in the sandbox. I really enjoyed working on this, and it's a departure from my usual sort of article and it's been a great experience.

item.title: Author Post!
item.content:encoded:
Wretched original draft by IAmTheOoga, new and improved co-authored with Zyn!

Reviewers: Big thanks to

  • Jazstar in chat for grammar fixes and story elements!
  • multizig in chat and pointing out story elements to address
  • Icepick in chat and noting specific details with style points!
  • GLacial in chat for streamlining the details
  • Karnickel in chat for finding inconsistencies to address
  • Ensophos for providing a wonderfully detailed review in the forums, with both grammar fixes and conceptual discussion
